name: Weekly Meal Planner
description: Plan meals for the week with recipes and grocery lists

agents.name: Meal Planner
agents.purpose: Create a weekly meal plan based on preferences
agents.system_prompt_hint: Create a 7-day meal plan (breakfast, lunch, dinner). Consider the user's dietary preferences, budget, and cooking skill level. Vary cuisines and ingredients to avoid monotony.

agents.name: Recipe & List Writer
agents.purpose: Write recipes and compile a grocery list
agents.system_prompt_hint: Write simple recipes for each planned meal. Include prep time, cook time, and serving size. Compile a consolidated grocery list organized by store section (produce, dairy, etc).

suggestion_card.title: Meal Planner
suggestion_card.subtitle: Plan meals and get grocery lists
suggestion_card.prompt_template: Plan my meals for the week, I like [preferences]

author: agentfactory
